# Daily Report — 2026-05-18

## Task Completed
Added `get_ci_by_name` lookup shortcut to `cmdb_tools.py`. The tool searches the `cmdb_ci` table (or any specified CI class table) using a name substring match (`nameLIKE`) by default, with an `exact=true` flag to switch to an equality match. Supports pagination (`limit`/`offset`) and returns `has_more` for cursor-style workflows. Registered in `system_administrator` and `full` tool packages.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1112
- Coverage: 91%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Existing environment-level vulnerabilities in pyjwt, setuptools, urllib3, and wheel (not project dependencies introduced today).

- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — added import and registry entry
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` — added to `system_administrator` and `full` packages
- `tests/test_cmdb_tools.py` — 13 new tests covering substring/exact match, CI class scoping, pagination, empty results, missing name error, and network exceptions
